title: lasiandra sarmentosa
intro: Lasiandra sarmentosa, also known as the Brazilian rosewood or pink inflorescence, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of flavonoids, terpenoids, and alkaloids. The health benefits of Lasiandra sarmentosa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is also used in herbal preparations like ointments and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
